searches.answer: In 2025, Python, JavaScript, and Java remain the most popular programming languages. Python leads in data science and AI, while JavaScript and Java are essential for web and enterprise development.

results.title: Top Programming Languages to Learn in 2025 | Pluralsight
results.content: Every year, Pluralsight conducts a meta-study of the most popular programming languages based on the last 12 months of data, so IT professionals can figure out what’s trending right now. We consult our learning platform of over 50,000 tech learners, as well as cross-checking our data with other popular industry surveys to get the best indication of what’s trending. results.title: Most In-demand Programming Languages for 2026
results.content: # Top 14 most in-demand programming languages. In-demand programming languages are those usually sought out by companies and used by software developers most often.
